title: pavonia patuliloba
intro: Pavonia patuliloba, also known as the Pavonia or Rose Mallow, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It is a member of the mallow family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Pavonia patuliloba is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture by herbalists, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and digestive issues.
